question.label: Mentoring useful
question.name: You said mentoring is where you still feel useful — what is it giving you?
question.description: Follows the mentoring thread to surface what need it is meeting and what sits underneath the dip.

answer: I am not sure the work I am doing is the work that gets recognized.

assessment.note: He explicitly doubts whether his current work is the kind that gets recognized, signalling both unclear advancement criteria and a stalled growth path.

new_queue.label: Recognized work
new_queue.name: What work do you think gets recognized here instead?

new_queue.label: Concrete path
new_queue.name: What concrete path forward feels real to you right now?

new_queue.label: Next step from me
new_queue.name: What do you need from me to make the next couple of weeks steadier?

history.answer_excerpt: I have been less present in rituals, yes.
I have been less present in rituals, yes.
After the promotion decision, I was not clear on what really needed to change.
I stayed focused on delivery because that felt controllable.
I am not sure the work I am doing is the work that gets recognized.
I am not sure the work I am doing is the work that gets recognized.
